title: ATM ORES EASY MODE
description: This pack turns allthemodium, vibranium, unobtanium + suspicous soulsand/clay into bright green blocks you can't miss.
body:
ATM ORES EASY MODE is a small, lightweight resource pack designed specifically for players of the All the Mods 9 modpack. Its goal is simple - to make it significantly easier to locate the three most important endgame ores – allthemodium, vibranium, and unobtanium. Bonus feature: suspicious soul sand and suspicious clay have also been recolored to make them easier to identify during exploration.


Instead of their normal textures, which can often blend into their environment, (especially in the end, nether, or deep underground) this pack replaces the ore blocks with a bright green texture, making them easy noticeable even at a distance or while mining quickly.


### What this pack changes:
 - Allthemodium ore texture
 - Vibranium ore texture
 - Unobtanium ore texture
 - Suspicious soul sand and suspicious clay texture


### Installation:
1. Download the .zip file.
2. Place it in your resourcepacks folder.
> To do this, press windows+r, type in curseforge, hit enter and follow this path - C:\Users\YourUsername\curseforge\minecraft\Instances\All the Mods 9 - ATM9\resourcepacks
3. Enable it in the minecraft resource packs menu by switching it from the left to the right side.
4. Play and profit.


**This pack may, and i repeat may work in newer or older versions of ATM or other modpacks using the same ore names, but it was designed and balanced for ATM9. If you need any help be sure to message me on discord xstevenssl :D**

Edit 16.09.25: Uploaded a working version for ATM10.
